title: Bump bridge to v2.35.2 + verify (via repos/ops/automation/agents/bridge/run_commands)
description: Dispatches the bridge/run_commands playbook through `noetl exec --runtime local` with a workload that lists the commands. The `playbook` field is a repo-relative file path — local runtime resolves it directly without catalog registration.

commands.shell: kubectl -n noetl set image deploy/ollama-bridge ollama-bridge=ghcr.io/noetl/noetl:v2.35.2

kubectl -n noetl exec deploy/ollama-bridge -- python3 -c 'import json,urllib.request; req=urllib.request.Request("http://localhost:8765/jsonrpc", data=json.dumps({"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}).encode(), headers={"Content-Type":"application/json"}, method="POST"); print(urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10).read().decode())'
